task_completion.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to research the RFCs on rfc-editor.org or IETF Datatracker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Firefox or another browser open to rfc-editor.org or datatracker.ietf.org pages for RFC 9113, 8446, or 9110.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the rfc_reference.json file in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, IDE, or terminal output showing the file path ~/Documents/rfc_reference.json.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains a correct entry for RFC 9113.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON content shows a key 'rfc9113' with 'title' (HTTP/2), 'publication_date' (2022-06), 'authors' (including Thomson), 'status' (Proposed Standard), and a 'description'.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains a correct entry for RFC 8446.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON content shows a key 'rfc8446' with 'title' (TLS 1.3), 'publication_date' (2018-08), 'authors' (including Rescorla), 'status' (Proposed Standard), and a 'description'.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains a correct entry for RFC 9110.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON content shows a key 'rfc9110' with 'title' (HTTP Semantics), 'publication_date' (2022-06), 'authors' (including Fielding), 'status' (Internet Standard), and a 'description'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Firefox bookmark folder named 'RFC Research' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox Bookmarks Toolbar, Bookmarks Menu, or Library window showing a folder explicitly named 'RFC Research'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'RFC Research' folder contains bookmarks to the three specified RFCs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the 'RFC Research' bookmark folder are visible and contain three distinct bookmarks linking to the official pages for RFC 9113, RFC 8446, and RFC 9110.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated the web browser to find the information rather than just hallucinating the JSON content.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show active browser tabs with the RFC documents loaded, not just an empty browser or terminal-only interaction.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the browser's GUI to create bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Firefox bookmarking dialog (star icon clicked, 'Edit This Bookmark' popup, or Library window interaction) rather than modifying Firefox sqlite/JSON files via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the output file is properly formatted JSON.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the rfc_reference.json file uses correct JSON syntax (curly braces, quoted keys, square brackets for the authors list).

privileged_info_for_vlm: RFC 9113: Title contains 'HTTP/2', Date is '2022-06', Author includes 'Thomson', Status is 'Proposed Standard'. RFC 8446: Title contains 'Transport Layer Security', 'TLS', '1.3', Date is '2018-08', Author includes 'Rescorla', Status is 'Proposed Standard'. RFC 9110: Title contains 'HTTP', 'Semantics', Date is '2022-06', Author includes 'Fielding', Status is 'Internet Standard'.
